commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Again Esther spoke unto Hathach, and gave him command concerning Mordecai; Posts, who had a right to make use of any person's horse (Menochius) Who. Protestants, "on horseback, and riders on mules, camels, and young dromedaries. "(Haydock) The original terms greatly embarrass interpreters. (Calmet) Septuagint have simply, "he sent the writings by letter-carriers, ordering them to follow their own laws in every city, to help themselves, and treat their adversaries and opponents as they pleased, on one day. This is a copy", chap.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
